UpdateAppBlbTcpListener.blbId: The identifier of the associated LoadBalancer
UpdateAppBlbTcpListener.clientToken: Idempotency token, up to 64 characters in length
UpdateAppBlbTcpListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports three modes: "RoundRobin" / "LeastConnection" / "Hash". "RoundRobin" indicates weighted round robin, "LeastConnection" indicates least connections, "Hash" indicates hashing based on source IP
UpdateAppBlbTcpListener.tcpSessionTimeout: TCP connection timeout (in seconds), default 900, must be an integer between 10 and 4000
UpdateAppBlbTcpListener.description: Description, up to 200 characters in length
